title: Mii Players
description: Changes Players to be Miis from Mii Maker, Mii Plaza, and Wii Sports.
body:
# Mii Players
This is a resource pack that turns the basic player model into something way better, this being Miis from their different apearences in Nintendo Media. Please credit if you use it in a video. (Socials are at Bottom of Page.)

The packs you can choose from are currently(might make more):
- Mii Maker
- Mii Plaza
- Wii Sports

![Mii Maker Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53022d3ee2fea3ce11c9e17cd6f882a47cef4b1e.png)

## My Socials
